sentence: 他是历届毕业生中成绩最好的。
pinyin: Tā shì lì jiè bì yè shēng zhōng chéng jì zuì hǎo de.
english: He is the highest-achieving graduate across all previous classes.

meaning: It's not easy, with great difficulty
sentence: 我好不容易才买到了这张演唱会的票。
pinyin: Wǒ hǎo bù róngyì cái mǎi dào le zhè zhāng yǎnchànghuì de piào.
english: I had great difficulty getting a ticket for this concert.

sentence: 这台发动机装有涡轮增压系统。
pinyin: Zhè tái fādòngjī zhuāng yǒu wōlún zēngyā xìtǒng.
english: This engine has a turbocharger system.

sentence: 妈妈烤了一个热乎乎的苹果派。
pinyin: Māma kǎo le yī gè rèhūhū de píngguǒpài.
english: Mom baked a warm apple pie.

sentence: 双方希望谈出一个共赢的方案。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng xīwàng tán chū yī gè gòngyíng de fāng'àn.
english: Both sides hope to negotiate a win-win solution.

sentence: 政府紧急为灾民提供了食物和帐篷。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ jǐnjí wèi zāimín tígōng le shíwù hé zhàngpeng.
english: The government urgently provided food and tents for the disaster victims.

sentence: 村里大多数农户都种了小麦。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ dàduōshù nónghù dōu zhòng le xiǎomài.
english: Most farming households in the village grew wheat.

sentence: 潜水艇发射了一枚鱼雷。
pinyin: Qiánshuǐtǐng fāshè le yī méi yúléi.
english: The submarine launched a torpedo.

sentence: 科学家正在研究反物质的特性。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā zhèngzài yánjiū fǎnwùzhì de tèxìng.
english: Scientists are studying the properties of antimatter.

sentence: 这首诗写于十九世纪中叶。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu shī xiě yú shíjiǔ shìjì zhōngyè.
english: This poem was written in the mid-nineteenth century.

meaning: 1. to illuminate; 2. to turn on the lights; 3. to light (a blaze)
sentence: 她点亮了蜡烛，整个房间都亮了。
pinyin: Tā diǎnliàng le làzhú, zhěnggè fángjiān dōu liàng le.
english: She lit the candle and the whole room lit up.

meaning: 1. (so as) to avoid; 2. to prevent; 3. (just) in case
sentence: 带把雨伞吧，以防下雨。
pinyin: Dài bǎ yǔsǎn ba, yǐfáng xià yǔ.
english: Bring an umbrella, just in case it rains.

meaning: 1. to go around; 2. to roam; 3. to tour
sentence: 这支乐队正在全国巡回演出。
pinyin: Zhè zhī yuèduì zhèngzài quánguó xúnhuí yǎnchū.
english: This band is currently on a nationwide tour.

sentence: 记者需要核实这条新闻的真实性。
pinyin: Jìzhě xūyào héshí zhè tiáo xīnwén de zhēnshíxìng.
english: The reporter needs to verify the authenticity of this news.

sentence: 工厂引入了自动控制系统来提高效率。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng yǐnrù le zìdòng kòngzhì xìtǒng lái tígāo xiàolǜ.
english: The factory introduced an automatic control system to improve efficiency.

sentence: 据估计，这次活动有五千人参加。
pinyin: Jù gūjì, zhè cì huódòng yǒu wǔqiān rén cānjiā.
english: According to estimates, five thousand people attended this event.

meaning: 1. similar; 2. about the same as; 3. approximately; 4. approximation
sentence: 这两种颜色非常近似，不容易区分。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng zhǒng yánsè fēicháng jìnsì, bù róngyì qūfēn.
english: These two colors are very similar and hard to tell apart.

sentence: 公众要求政府提高财政透明度。
pinyin: Gōngzhòng yāoqiú zhèngfǔ tígāo cáizhèng tòumíngdù.
english: The public demands the government improve fiscal transparency.

sentence: 学校的北侧有一片操场。
pinyin: Xuéxiào de běicè yǒu yī piàn cāochǎng.
english: There is a sports field on the north side of the school.

sentence: 这列火车只在这个区间运行。
pinyin: Zhè liè huǒchē zhǐ zài zhège qūjiān yùnxíng.
english: This train only runs within this section of the route.

sentence: 那个年代，很多青年立志救国。
pinyin: Nà gè niándài, hěn duō qīngnián lìzhì jiùguó.
english: In that era, many young people were determined to save the nation.

meaning: 1. the most honorable; 2. the most respected; 3. supreme; 4. (archaic)
sentence: 这款套餐被称为至尊版。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn tàocān bèi chēng wéi zhìzūn bǎn.
english: This package is called the supreme edition.

sentence: 记者走访了多个受灾村庄。
pinyin: Jìzhě zǒufǎng le duō gè shòuzāi cūnzhuāng.
english: The reporter visited several disaster-affected villages.

sentence: 老师说的这句话意味深长。
pinyin: Lǎoshī shuō de zhè jù huà yìwèi shēncháng.
english: What the teacher said carries deep and profound meaning.

meaning: 1. special-purpose phone line or communications link; 2. hotline; 3. s
sentence: 机场和市区之间有一条专线大巴。
pinyin: Jīchǎng hé shìqū zhījiān yǒu yī tiáo zhuānxiàn dàbā.
english: There is a dedicated bus line between the airport and downtown.

sentence: 这家公司主要出口纺织品。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zhǔyào chūkǒu fǎngzhīpǐn.
english: This company mainly exports textiles.

meaning: 1. to get past the qualifying round; 2. to make it to the finals
sentence: 她的短片成功入围了电影节。
pinyin: Tā de duǎnpiàn chénggōng rùwéi le diànyǐngjié.
english: Her short film successfully made it into the film festival.

sentence: 曾祖母那个年代的女性很多都裹小脚。
pinyin: Zēngzǔmǔ nà gè niándài de nǚxìng hěn duō dōu guǒ xiǎojiǎo.
english: Many women in great-grandmother's era had bound feet.

sentence: 这组数据的均值是八十五分。
pinyin: Zhè zǔ shùjù de jūnzhí shì bāshíwǔ fēn.
english: The average value of this data set is eighty-five points.

meaning: to place an order; to order
sentence: 我刚刚在网上下单买了一双跑鞋。
pinyin: Wǒ gānggāng zài wǎngshàng xià dān mǎile yī shuāng pǎoxié.
english: I just placed an order online for a pair of running shoes.

meaning: the side in favor of the proposition (in a formal debate)
sentence: 辩论赛中，正方认为城市生活更幸福。
pinyin: Biànlùnsài zhōng, zhèngfāng rènwéi chéngshì shēnghuó gèng xìngfú.
english: In the debate, the affirmative side argued that city life is happier.

meaning: little girl who is older than another young child (e.g. her playmate);
sentence: 便利店里那位小姐姐服务态度特别好。
pinyin: Biànlìdiàn lǐ nà wèi xiǎo jiě jiě fúwù tàidu tèbié hǎo.
english: The young lady at the convenience store has a really great attitude.

sentence: 经查，这笔钱确实已经转到账户里了。
pinyin: Jīng chá, zhè bǐ qián quèshí yǐjīng zhuǎn dào zhànghù lǐ le.
english: Upon investigation, the money had indeed been transferred to the account.

sentence: 他整天点头哈腰，简直是个奴才。
pinyin: Tā zhěngtiān diǎntóu hāyāo, jiǎnzhí shì gè nú cái.
english: He bows and scrapes all day long—he's a total pushover.

sentence: 他在那次展览上发现了很好的商机。
pinyin: Tā zài nà cì zhǎnlǎn shàng fāxiàn le hěn hǎo de shāng jī.
english: He spotted a great business opportunity at that trade fair.

meaning: married woman; wife (as a social role)
sentence: 她已经是人妻了，你就别追了。
pinyin: Tā yǐjīng shì rén qī le, nǐ jiù bié zhuī le.
english: She's already someone's wife—stop chasing her.

sentence: 这件外套在香港买的，花了六百港元。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn wàitào zài Xiānggǎng mǎi de, huā le liùbǎi gǎng yuán.
english: I bought this jacket in Hong Kong for six hundred Hong Kong dollars.

sentence: 这家平台吸引了很多大品牌广告主。
pinyin: Zhè jiā píngtái xīyǐn le hěn duō dà pǐnpái guǎng gào zhǔ.
english: This platform has attracted many major brand advertisers.

sentence: 老师发了一份课程纲要给我们。
pinyin: Lǎo shī fā le yī fèn kè chéng gāng yào gěi wǒ men.
english: The teacher handed out a course outline to us.

sentence: 他们两个合伙开了一家咖啡店。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè héhuǒ kāi le yī jiā kāfēidiàn.
english: The two of them partnered up to open a coffee shop.

sentence: 这次发射是航天史上的里程碑。
pinyin: Zhè cì fāshè shì hángtiān shǐ shàng de lǐchéngbēi.
english: This launch is a milestone in the history of space exploration.

sentence: 她用面粉和鸡蛋做了一个蛋糕。
pinyin: Tā yòng miànfěn hé jīdàn zuò le yī gè dàngāo.
english: She made a cake using flour and eggs.

meaning: 1. to indicate; 2. to foretell; 3. to forebode; 4. to betoken
sentence: 天边的乌云预示着暴雨即将来临。
pinyin: Tiānbiān de wūyún yùshì zhe bàoyǔ jíjiāng láilín.
english: The dark clouds on the horizon foretell that a heavy rain is coming.

sentence: 他把孩子送进了一所私立小学。
pinyin: Tā bǎ háizi sòng jìn le yī suǒ sīlì xiǎoxué.
english: He enrolled his child in a private elementary school.

sentence: 医生说这个感染需要吃抗生素。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō zhège gǎnrǎn xūyào chī kàngshēngsù.
english: The doctor said this infection requires antibiotics.

meaning: 1. to damage; 2. to devastate; 3. to vandalize; 4. damage; 5. destruct
sentence: 洪水毁坏了不少农田。
pinyin: Hóng shuǐ huǐ huài le bù shǎo nóng tián.
english: The flood damaged a lot of farmland.

sentence: 最近原材料价格上涨，生产成本也跟着增加了。
pinyin: Zuìjìn yuán cáiliào jiàgé shàngzhǎng, shēngchǎn chéngběn yě gēnzhe zēngjiā le.
english: Raw material prices have risen recently, so production costs have gone up as well.

sentence: 小区里的住户反映停车位不够用。
pinyin: Xiǎoqū lǐ de zhù hù fǎnyìng tíngchēwèi bù gòu yòng.
english: Residents of the compound have complained that there aren't enough parking spaces.

sentence: 这所学校的师资力量很强。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xuéxiào de shīzī lìliàng hěn qiáng.
english: This school has a very strong teaching staff.

sentence: 那只大狗的叫声真吓人。
pinyin: Nà zhī dà gǒu de jiào shēng zhēn xià rén.
english: The barking of that big dog is really scary.
